# allowedProtocols

**Instance Property**

The protocols allowed for communication with the Smart Card. [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardProtocol/any] by default.

## Declaration

```swift
var allowedProtocols: TKSmartCardProtocol { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property is consulted only when beginning a session to a Smart Card. Any changes to this property will not be reflected by the current session, if one is already established.

## Setting the Communication Protocol

- **currentProtocol**: The protocol used for communication with the Smart Card. Returns [doc://com.apple.cryptotokenkit/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardProtocol/TKSmartCardProtocolNone] if no session is currently established.
- **TKSmartCardProtocol**: Smart Card transmission protocols.
